div.div: Hello Kitty and other Sanrio characters star in adaptations of various fairy tales from all over the world. This entry contains: 1. Hello kitty no Shirayukihime / Hello Kitty in "Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs" (ハローキティの白雪姫) 2. Bad Badtz-maru no Ookami ga Kita! / Badtz-Maru in "The Shepherd Boy and the Wolf" (バッドばつ丸のオオカミが来た！) 3. Pochakko no Jack to Mame no ki / Pochacco in "Jack and the Beanstalk" (ポチャッコのジャックと豆の木) 4. Hello Kitty no Susama no Mimi wa Roba no Mimi / Hello Kitty & Mimmy in "The Story of King Midas" (ハローキティの王様の耳はロバの耳) 5. Hello Kitty no Hansel to Gretel / Hello Kitty & Dear Daniel in "Hansel & Gretel" (ハローキティのヘンゼルとグレーテル) 6. My Melody no Akazukin / My Melody in "Little Red Riding Hood" (マイメロディの赤ずきん) 7. Hello Kitty no Kaguya-Hime / Hello Kitty in "The Bamboo Princess" (ハローキティのかぐや姫) 8. Hangyodon no Hadaka no Ousama / Hangyodon in "The Emperor's New Clothes" (ハンギョドンのはだかの王様) 9. Hello Kitty no Nemureru Mori no Bijo / Hello Kitty in "Sleeping Beauty" (ハローキティのねむれる森の美女) 10. Bad Badtz-Maru no Ari to Kirigirisu / Badtz-Maru in "The Ants and the Grasshopper" (バッドばつ丸のアリとキリギリス) 11. Hello Kitty no Hakuchou no Ouji / Hello Kitty in "The Wild Swans" (ハローキティの白鳥の王子) 12. O Saru no Monkichi no Kin no Ono Gin no Ono / Monkichi in "Mercury and the Workmen" (おさるのもんきちの金の斧 銀の斧) 13. Hello Kitty no Kurumiwari Ningyou / Hello Kitty in "The Nutcracker" (ハローキティのくるみ割り人形) 14. Corocorokuririn no Inaka no Nezumi Tokai no Nezumi / Corocorokuririn in "The Country Mouse and the Town Mouse" (コロコロクリリンの田舎のネズミ都会のネズミ) 15. Hello Kitty no Momotarou / Hello Kitty in "Momotaro" (ハローキティの桃太郎) 16. Pompompurin no Usagi to Kame / Pompompurin in "The Tortoise and the Hare" (ポムポムプリンのウサギとカメ) 17. Hello Kitty no Cinderella / Hello Kitty in "Cinderella" (ハローキティのシンデレラ) 18. Ahiru no Pekkle no Ahiru no Drakestail / Pekkle in "Drakestail" (アヒルのペックルのアヒルのドレイクステール) 19. Kero Kero Keroppi no Arajin to Mahou no Ranpu / Keroppi in "Aladdin and the Magic Lamp" (けろけろけろっぴのアラジンと魔法のランプ) 20. Hello Kitty no Match Uri no Shoujo / Hello Kitty in "The Little Match Girl" (ハローキティのマッチ売りの少女) 21. Hello Kitty no Nagagutsu o Haita Neko / Hello Kitty in "Puss in Boots" (ハローキティの長靴をはいた猫) 22. Ahiru no Pekkle no Minikui Ahiru no ko / Pekkle in "The Ugly Duckling" (アヒルのペックルのみにくいアヒルの子) 23. Hello Kitty no o Yayu bi Hime / Hello Kitty in "Thumbelina" (ハローキティのおやゆび姫) 24. Pompompurin no Kitakaze to Taiyou / Pompompurin in "The North Wind and the Sun" (ポムポムプリンの北風と太陽) 25. Hello Kitty no Yuki no Joou / Hello Kitty & Dear Daniel in "The Snow Queen" (ハローキティの雪の女王) 26. Hello Kitty no 3 Hiki no ko Buta / Hello Kitty, Mimmy, & Dear Daniel in "The Three Little Pigs" (ハローキティの3匹の子ぶた)

It all started with the 17 "Origins," whose powers were passed down to individuals who still exist around the world today. A man carrying a coffin and a girl with the eyes of a beast appear in a town. The girl was once cursed by a witch and now searches for her in order to undo the curse. Is the witch who appears before them the quarry they've been searching for? And how can the curse be undone? This quest for revenge against an evil witch begins rolling when the beast captures the witch. This magnificent and intense dark fantasy begins now!
(Source: Crunchyroll)
Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai: Tensaitachi no Renai Zunousen
Comedy, Psychological, Romance, Slice of Life

As leaders of their prestigious academy’s student council, Kaguya and Miyuki are the elite of the elite! But it’s lonely at the top… Luckily for them, they’ve fallen in love! There’s just one problem—they both have too much pride to admit it. And so begins the daily scheming to get the object of their affection to confess their romantic feelings first… Love is a war you win by losing. (Source: VIZ Media) Notes: - The first 10 chapters were published in Monthly Miracle Jump. It switched to Weekly Young Jump starting with Ch. 11, with the chapter count being reset. This entry still includes the first 10 chapters from Miracle Jump. - Winner of the 65th Shogakukan Manga Award for "Best General Manga" category in 2019.

Though Ayase Yuu is the son of a renowned and talented actress, he is below average in anything he does. He is entrusted to live under the care of his mother's friend and later discovers that he will also be rooming with the three sisters from his school who possess both beauty and talent. Though Yuu thought that an understanding would be impossible to reach between an ordinary person and those blessed with talent, the three sisters are surprisingly...?!
How do you use Aeron MDS with multiple publishers and a single subscriber where the publishers are unaware of the subscriber machine IPs?

I am trying to use Aeron Multi-Destination-Subscriptions where I have multiple publishers publish messages to their own IP address and port. I want a subscriber to subscribe to each of the publishers IP addresses and PORTs on the same stream ID. The publishers and subscribers are on separate machines. For simplicity, I'm testing this with a single Publisher and Subscriber setup. I am using docker to create a virtual network so I can designate the IPs of the publisher and subscriber machines. Here is my example code: Publication code final String publicationChannel = new ChannelUriStringBuilder() .media(UDP_MEDIA) (3 more lines were trimmed) Subscription code final String subscriptionChannel = new ChannelUriStringBuilder() .media(UDP_MEDIA) (8 more lines were trimmed) I have a doWork in both of these which repeatedly call subscription.isConnected() and publication.isConnected(). I expected this to work just like the MDC example where you can use control-mode=manual on the publication side and call publication.addDestination(subscriberIP:port) where the subscription would be setup to subscribe to its own subscriberIP:port. In testing, the publication and subscription are not connected. This test class in the aeron repo uses MDS over UDP using localhost and using multicast addresses MDSTest so I thought the same would hold true for using the publisher machines IP and port. Would really appreciate if someone could explain why this doesn't work?
